FR-01.title: Property Listing
requirements: Agents can list properties with details, photos, and video tours
Properties categorized by type (house, apartment, condo, land)
Set listing status (for sale, for rent, sold)
acceptance_criteria: Listing created with all details and media

FR-02.title: Property Search
requirements: Search by location, price range, bedrooms, and type
Map view showing property pins with price labels
Save searches with email alerts for new matches
Advanced filters: square footage, year built, amenities
acceptance_criteria: Alerts sent when new listings match

FR-03.title: Property Detail Page
requirements: Photo gallery with fullscreen and slideshow
Property details: price, beds, baths, sqft, year, description
Neighborhood info with nearby schools, transit, and amenities
acceptance_criteria: Gallery loads all photos with navigation

FR-04.title: Mortgage Calculator
requirements: Calculate monthly payment based on price, down payment, rate, and term
Compare different loan scenarios side by side
acceptance_criteria: Amortization table shows principal vs interest

FR-05.title: Agent Profiles
requirements: Agent profile with photo, bio, certifications, and listings
Client reviews and ratings for agents
acceptance_criteria: Contact form sends message to agent
Stats show listings sold and active

FR-06.title: Scheduling Property Tours
requirements: Request tour with preferred dates and times
Virtual tour option via video call
acceptance_criteria: Video call link generated for virtual tours

FR-07.title: Saved Properties and Favorites
requirements: Compare up to 4 properties side by side
Price drop alerts for saved properties
Share properties via email or social media

FR-09.title: Document Management
requirements: Upload and store property documents (title, inspection, disclosure)
Document sharing with buyers and agents

FR-10.title: Market Analytics Dashboard
acceptance_criteria: Trends show over selected time period

FR-11.title: Open House Management
requirements: Schedule open house events for listings
acceptance_criteria: Open house appears on listing page

FR-13.title: Property Valuation Tool
requirements: Estimate property value using comparable sales
Adjust estimate based on condition and upgrades
acceptance_criteria: Estimate within reasonable range of market
History chart shows value over years

FR-14.title: Notification System
requirements: New listing alerts matching saved searches

FR-15.title: Admin Content Moderation
requirements: Review and approve new listings before publishing

FR-01.title: Build Property Listing API
FR-01.description: Create POST /api/properties with all fields (type, price, beds, baths, sqft, description, address, lat/lng). Support multi-image and video upload. Virtual tour 360 photo processing. Set listing status.

FR-01.title: Build Listing Creation Form
FR-01.description: Create multi-step listing form: property details, address with map pin, photo/video upload with drag ordering, virtual tour upload, pricing and status. Preview before publishing.

FR-01.title: Create Property Database Schema
FR-01.description: Design properties table: id, agent_id, type, status, price, beds, baths, sqft, year_built, description, address, lat, lng, images, virtual_tour_url, created_at. Add geo index and search index.

FR-02.title: Build Property Search API
FR-02.description: Create GET /api/properties/search with Elasticsearch. Support location (geo radius), price range, beds, baths, type, sqft, year, amenities. Map bounds query. Saved search CRUD with alert scheduling.

FR-02.title: Build Search and Map UI
FR-02.description: Create split view: results list with property cards and interactive map with price-labeled pins. Filter sidebar. Saved search button. Map drag triggers new search.

FR-03.title: Build Property Detail API
FR-03.description: Create GET /api/properties/:id returning all details, photos, floor plan, agent info, and neighborhood data. Increment view count. Fetch nearby amenities from geo service.

FR-03.title: Build Property Detail Page
FR-03.description: Create detail page with photo gallery (fullscreen, slideshow), key stats bar, description, floor plan viewer, neighborhood map with POI markers, and agent contact card.

FR-04.title: Build Mortgage Calculator API
FR-04.description: Create POST /api/calculator/mortgage (price, down_payment, rate, term). Return monthly payment, total interest, amortization schedule. Support multiple scenario comparison.

FR-04.title: Build Calculator UI
FR-04.description: Create mortgage calculator with input sliders (price, down payment %, rate, term), payment breakdown pie chart, comparison table for scenarios, and amortization schedule table.

FR-05.title: Build Agent Profile API
FR-05.description: Create GET /api/agents/:id (profile, listings, stats). POST /api/agents/:id/reviews. POST /api/agents/:id/contact (send message). Calculate performance metrics.

FR-05.title: Build Agent Profile Page
FR-05.description: Create agent page with photo, bio, certifications, active listings grid, reviews section, contact form, and stats (listings sold, avg days on market, response time).

FR-06.title: Build Tour Scheduling API
FR-06.description: Create POST /api/tours (property_id, preferred_dates). Agent endpoints: PATCH /api/tours/:id/confirm or /suggest-alternative. POST /api/tours/:id/virtual (generate video call link). Calendar integration.

FR-06.title: Build Tour Booking UI
FR-06.description: Create tour request form with date/time preferences, tour type (in-person/virtual), and notes. Confirmation screen with calendar add button. Virtual tour with video call launcher.

FR-07.title: Build Favorites API
FR-07.description: Create POST /api/favorites/:propertyId (toggle). GET /api/favorites. GET /api/properties/compare?ids=1,2,3,4. POST /api/properties/:id/share. Price change webhook for alerts.

FR-07.title: Build Favorites and Compare UI
FR-07.description: Create favorites page with property cards and remove buttons. Compare view with side-by-side table (price, beds, baths, sqft, year). Share modal with email/social options.

FR-08.title: Build Lead Management API
FR-08.description: Create lead CRM: POST /api/leads (from inquiries), PATCH /api/leads/:id/stage (pipeline), POST /api/leads/:id/tasks (follow-ups with reminders), GET /api/leads/analytics.

FR-08.title: Build Lead Dashboard
FR-08.description: Create CRM view with pipeline Kanban board, lead detail with interaction history, task/reminder creator, and analytics charts showing lead sources and conversion rates.

FR-09.title: Build Document Management API
FR-09.description: Create CRUD for property documents with secure storage. POST /api/documents/:id/share (generate access link). E-signature integration API. Track document expiry dates.

FR-09.title: Build Document Center
FR-09.description: Create document manager with upload drag-drop, folder organization by property, share button with recipient picker, signature request flow, and expiry alert indicators.

FR-10.title: Build Analytics API
FR-10.description: Create GET /api/analytics/market with area parameter. Calculate avg price, price/sqft, days on market, inventory levels. Historical trends. Export PDF reports.

FR-10.title: Build Analytics Dashboard
FR-10.description: Create market analytics page with area selector, price trend line chart, days on market bar chart, price/sqft heat map, and exportable market report.

FR-11.title: Build Open House API
FR-11.description: Create POST /api/properties/:id/open-house (date, time, notes). Public page with RSVP. POST /api/open-house/:id/signin (visitor info capture). Automated follow-up email after event.

FR-11.title: Build Open House UI
FR-11.description: Create open house event page with RSVP button, mobile-friendly sign-in form with QR code, and post-event attendee list for agents.

FR-12.title: Build Rental Application API
FR-12.description: Create POST /api/rentals/apply (personal info, employment, references). Integrate background check service. Status tracking. POST /api/rentals/:id/lease for e-signature.

FR-12.title: Build Rental Application UI
FR-12.description: Create rental application multi-step form (personal, employment, references, consent). Application tracker with status. Lease review and e-sign flow.

FR-13.title: Build Valuation API
FR-13.description: Create GET /api/properties/valuation?address= using comparable sales algorithm. Accept condition adjustments. GET /api/properties/valuation/history for trends. POST /api/appraisal/request.

FR-13.title: Build Valuation Tool UI
FR-13.description: Create valuation page with address input, estimated value display with confidence range, comparable sales list, adjustment sliders, and historical value chart.

FR-14.title: Build Notification Service
FR-14.description: Create notification engine: saved search alerts (new listing match), price change webhooks, tour reminders (24h/1h), and document/offer notifications. Support email, push, and SMS channels.

FR-14.title: Build Notification Preferences
FR-14.description: Create notification settings page with channel toggles per notification type. Notification center with history and read/unread status.

FR-15.title: Build Admin Moderation API
FR-15.description: Create GET /api/admin/listings/pending (approval queue). PATCH /api/admin/listings/:id/approve or /reject. POST /api/admin/flag/:contentId. Agent verification CRUD. Platform analytics endpoints.

FR-15.title: Build Admin Panel
FR-15.description: Create admin dashboard with pending listings queue, content moderation tools, agent verification workflow, and platform analytics (total listings, users, traffic charts).
